# Kwik Plumbing and Heating Inc.

> Licensed master plumbers serving Providence and all of Rhode Island for 15+ years. Family-owned, three generations of plumbing expertise. RI Master Plumber License #PL-04482. Authorized Navien specialist.

Kwik Plumbing and Heating Inc. is a full-service plumbing and heating contractor based at 1149 Hartford Avenue, Johnston, RI 02919, founded in 2009 by Mike Kwiatkowski. The business serves residential and commercial customers across Providence, Cranston, Warwick, East Providence, Pawtucket, North Providence, Johnston, and the broader state of Rhode Island. Phone: (401) 639-1047. Email: kwikplumbingoffice@gmail.com.

Hours of operation: Monday–Friday 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM, Sunday by appointment.

## Core information

- [Homepage](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/): Overview of services, service area, and contact information.
- [About](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/about): Company history, founder, team, licenses, and certifications.
- [Contact](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/contact): Phone, email, address, hours, and service area.
- [All Services](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/services): Full directory of plumbing and heating services.

## Service pages

- [Boiler Services](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/boiler-services): Gas, oil, and steam boiler installation, repair, and maintenance. Authorized Navien specialist. Oil-to-gas conversions.
- [Gas Line Services](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/gas-services): Gas line installation, repair, leak detection, generator and appliance hookups. Permitted and pressure-tested.
- [Drain Cleaning](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/drain-cleaning): Professional drain cleaning, hydro-jetting up to 4,000 PSI, CCTV camera inspection, root intrusion removal, and main sewer line clearing.
- [Water Heater Services](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/water-heater): Tank and tankless water heater installation and repair. Same-day service. Navien, Rinnai, Noritz, Rheem, Bradford White, A.O. Smith, and others.
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/bathroom-remodeling): Complete bathroom rough-in to finish plumbing for renovations.
- [Leak Detection](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/leak-detection): Acoustic, infrared, and pressure-test leak detection for hidden leaks. Whole-house water filtration. Well pump service.
- [Pipe Repair & Repiping](https://www.kwikprovidence.com/pipe-repair): Burst pipe repair, whole-home repiping, lead-pipe replacement, galvanized-to-copper or PEX conversions.

## Credentials and certifications

- Rhode Island Master Plumber License #PL-04482
- City of Providence Contractor Registration
- RI Department of Environmental Management Certification (backflow prevention)
- EPA Section 608 Certification
- PHCC (Plumbing-Heating-Cooling Contractors Association) Member
- WaterSense Partner (EPA)
- BBB Accredited Business — A+ Rating
- National Grid Authorized Contractor
- Rinnai, Navien, and Noritz Authorized Service Provider
- Gas Safe Certified
